THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, RAMON BARAJAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALPHA GC CONSTRUCTION, INC. ESPINOZA, HIPOLITO $11,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,590.00, DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $11,500. DEFENDANTS FRAUDULENTLY TOOK PLAINTIFFS MONEY ($11,500) AND FAILED TO DELIVER DRAWING AS PROMISED. DEFENDANTS SHALL BE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
